title: Oxford: BioNtech同Moderna 血栓機會同阿斯利康差唔多

replies.msg:
A study by Oxford University found the number of people who receive blood clots after getting vaccinated with a coronavirus vaccine are about the same for those who get Pfizer PFE and Moderna MRNA vaccines as they are for the AstraZeneca AZN vaccine that was produced with the university's help.

https://www.marketwatch.com/amp/story/blood-clots-as-prevalent-with-pfizer-and-moderna-vaccine-as-with-astrazenecas-report-2021-04-15?mod=mw_more_headlines


係咪因為唔憤氣自己支針俾人ban先出份paper唱衰其他兩隻疫苗

AstraZeneca 1in5m
BioNTech 1in4m
如果AstraZeneca唔畀打 咁BioNTech係咪都有可能無得再打
